title: Automation to move to a Group when Status changes, with exclusion
excerpt:
I am trying to setup an automation, " When status changes to anything (except this), move item to this group." 
Is it Possible?

posts.author: Dipak (Dipak Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to setup an automation, " When status changes to anything (except this), move item to this group."
Is it Possible?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Dipak

Welcome to the community! You can do this with a custom automation like:

image1588×351 17.2 KB

When changes the status to anything but Stuck the item is moved to the group
